'''βàög-dh-v-n''' ('''kagadhvenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tube|tube]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tube|tube]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàög-dh-v-n
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhvenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhvenoko|thigadhvenoko]] || [[word:jigadhvenoko|jigadhvenoko]] || [[word:shigadhvenoko|shigadhvenoko]] || [[word:kigadhvenoko|kigadhvenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadhvenoko|thuthugadhvenoko]] || [[word:jujugadhvenoko|jujugadhvenoko]] || [[word:shushugadhvenoko|shushugadhvenoko]] || [[word:kukugadhvenoko|kukugadhvenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadhvenoko|thugadhvenoko]] || [[word:jugadhvenoko|jugadhvenoko]] || [[word:shugadhvenoko|shugadhvenoko]] || [[word:kugadhvenoko|kugadhvenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠgadhvenoko|thΟΠgadhvenoko]] || [[word:jΟΠgadhvenoko|jΟΠgadhvenoko]] || [[word:shΟΠgadhvenoko|shΟΠgadhvenoko]] || [[word:kΟΠgadhvenoko|kΟΠgadhvenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadhvenoko|thagadhvenoko]] || [[word:jagadhvenoko|jagadhvenoko]] || [[word:shagadhvenoko|shagadhvenoko]] || [[word:kagadhvenoko|kagadhvenoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
